# Docs

- [☁️ Welcome to filo studios.](/docs)
- Common escrow errors: Common escrow errors and how to resolve them
  - [Error: You lack the required entitlement](/docs/common_escrow/lack)
  - [Error: syntax error near <\1>](/docs/common_escrow/parsing)
- Free Resources: My collection of free resources
  - filo_textui
    - [filo_textui](/docs/free_resources/filo_textui): Lightweight world-space and screen-space text UI for FiveM.

    - **3D Labels**
    - [DrawText3D](/docs/free_resources/filo_textui/draw-text-3d): Render a label stack in world space, attached to an entity or fixed coordinates.
    - [HideText3D](/docs/free_resources/filo_textui/hide-text-3d): Destroy an active 3D world label.
    - [IsTextVisible](/docs/free_resources/filo_textui/is-text-visible): Check whether a 3D label is currently active.

    - **2D Text UI**
    - [DrawText](/docs/free_resources/filo_textui/draw-text): Show the 2D bottom bar prompt, or attach a single label to an entity.
    - [HideText](/docs/free_resources/filo_textui/hide-text): Hide the 2D bottom bar prompt.
- Paid Resources: My collection of paid resources
  - 🔑 filo_vehiclekeys
    - [🔑 filo_vehiclekeys](/docs/paid_resources/filo_vehiclekeys): A fully refactored vehicle key management and locksmith system for FiveM.
    - [Compatibility](/docs/paid_resources/filo_vehiclekeys/compatibility): Drop-in support for qb-vehiclekeys, and qbx_vehiclekeys.
    - [Configuration](/docs/paid_resources/filo_vehiclekeys/configuration): Full breakdown of every config option available in filo_vehiclekeys.
    - [Exports](/docs/paid_resources/filo_vehiclekeys/exports): Client and server exports provided by filo_vehiclekeys for use in other resources.
    - [Flows](/docs/paid_resources/filo_vehiclekeys/flows): How mechanical key cutting, OBD fob programming, and the NPC locksmith store work.
    - [Installation](/docs/paid_resources/filo_vehiclekeys/installation): Dependencies, setup steps, and migration from the legacy BIN format.
